reasoning: According to multiple sources, there is currently no vaccine available or even in clinical development for Human bocavirus infection. Vaccine development is further hindered by the lack of an animal model and versatile cell culture systems. Given that the forecast horizon spans only from November 2025 to January 2026, it is medically and functionally impossible for a legitimate vaccine to be designed, tested, evaluated, approved, properly recognized, and reliably recorded on Wikipedia within 1 to 3 months. The only non-zero probability relates to temporary vandalism or an accidental misclassification on Wikipedia at the moment of resolution. Thus, probabilities remain near the allowed minimum (0.02), slightly increasing for later dates due to extended exposure to potential vandalism or other unforeseen anomalies.
